title: [MTR4] The Amtrak addon
body:
The **National Railroad Passenger Corperation**, Better known as **Amtrak**, has been operatiing in the United States of America since 1971. Created the Passing of the **Rail Passenger Service Act**, Amtrak Connects american cities by Rail, across over 20,000 Miles of Track.

This Resource Pack aims to bring the Locomotives and Rolling Stock of Amtrak into Minecraft Via Minecraft Transit Railway 4.0.0

Rolling Stock:
- Superliner II
- Amfleet
- Venture & Airo
- Viewliner

Locomotives:
- GE Genesis
- GE Dash 8-32BWH
- EMD F40PH
- EMD AEM-7
- EMD SDP40F
- Seimens SC-44
- Seimens ALC-42
- Seimens ACS-64

Trainsets:
- Metroliner
- Acela Express
- Avelia Liberty

This pack is Not Affiliated with the National Railroad Passinger Corperation or the United States Department of Transportation.
